---
title: "Figure S: Nitrate Concentration and Proportion"
author: "Jared Flater"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    self-contained: true
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 6
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r theme}
theme_publication <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#ffffffff", color = NA),
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#ffffffff", color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = alpha("#A5CAD2", 0.2)),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = alpha("#B7B5B3", 0.2)),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing    = unit(2, "lines"),
      panel.border     = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),
      text             = element_text(color = "#000000ff"),
      axis.text        = element_text(color = "#000000ff", size = base_size * 0.8),
      axis.title       = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      axis.line        = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.ticks       = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      legend.position       = "top",
      legend.justification  = "center",
      legend.direction      = "horizontal",
      legend.box            = "vertical",
      legend.margin         = margin(b = 1, unit = "pt"),
      legend.box.margin     = margin(b = 1, unit = "pt"),
      legend.text           = element_text(size = base_size * 0.9),
      legend.title          = element_text(size = base_size),
      legend.key.width      = unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.key.height     = unit(0.3, "cm")
    )
}

# Subtle grays/blues for Maize & Soybean; distinct greens for Sorghum treatments
treatment_colors <- c(
  "Maize"         = "#B0B0B0",   # neutral gray
  "Soybean"       = "#A8C8E8",   # light steel blue
  "Sorghum"       = "#D8D97AFF", # yellow-green
  "Sorghum + WCC" = "#95C36EFF"  # medium green
)
```

```{r data}
leaching_data <- read_csv("data/clean_leaching.csv") |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    year = year(date)
  ) |>
  filter(year %in% c(2023, 2024))
```

```{r figure}
# Prepare concentration data
conc_data <- leaching_data |>
  filter(!is.na(nitrate_mg_l), !is.na(ammonia_mg_l)) |>
  mutate(
    total_inorganic_n = nitrate_mg_l + ammonia_mg_l,
    prop_nitrate      = nitrate_mg_l / total_inorganic_n
  ) |>
  filter(total_inorganic_n > 0)

# Rename treatments and set order for both panels
conc_data <- conc_data |>
  mutate(
    Treatment = case_when(
      treatment == "Corn"          ~ "Maize",
      treatment == "Soy"           ~ "Soybean",
      treatment == "Sorghum + Rye" ~ "Sorghum + WCC",
      TRUE                         ~ treatment
    ),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment,
                       levels = c("Maize", "Soybean", "Sorghum", "Sorghum + WCC"))
  )

# Summary stats for median lines in panel (a)
conc_stats <- conc_data |>
  group_by(Treatment) |>
  summarise(median_no3 = median(nitrate_mg_l, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Panel (a): Density plot — all treatments
p_density <- ggplot(conc_data, aes(x = nitrate_mg_l, fill = Treatment, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(
    data     = conc_stats,
    aes(xintercept = median_no3, color = Treatment),
    linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = treatment_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = treatment_colors) +
  labs(
    tag   = "(a)",
    x     = expression(NO[3]^{"-"}*"-N Concentration (mg L"^{-1}*")"),
    y     = "Density",
    fill  = "Treatment",
    color = "Treatment"
  ) +
  theme_publication(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.tag          = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    plot.tag.position = "topleft"
  )

# Count values below 50% for caption note
n_below_50 <- conc_data |>
  filter(prop_nitrate < 0.5) |>
  group_by(Treatment) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Panel (b): Proportion NO3 by treatment, faceted by year, trimmed to 50–100%
p_prop <- ggplot(conc_data, aes(x = Treatment, y = prop_nitrate * 100, fill = Treatment)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = 1, alpha = 0.7, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 90, linetype = "dotted", color = "grey40") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(50, 100)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = treatment_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"),
    breaks = c(50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ year) +
  labs(
    tag     = "(b)",
    x       = "",
    y       = expression("Proportion of Inorganic N as NO"[3]^{"-"}),
    caption = "Two Soybean values fell below 50% and are not shown."
  ) +
  theme_publication(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "none",
    plot.tag          = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    plot.tag.position = "topleft",
    plot.caption      = element_text(size = 8, hjust = 0, color = "grey40")
  )

# Combine panels — suppress auto-tagging since tags are set manually
fig_n_speciation <- (p_density / p_prop)

fig_n_speciation
```



```{r save}
ggsave(
  "SubmissionFiguresTables/SuppFigurex_Nitrate_Concentration_Proportion.png",
  plot   = fig_n_speciation,
  width  = 174, height = 200, units = "mm", dpi = 600, bg = "white"
)
```
